name: skin-flat
title: Flat skin
description: Neutral reset skin with square corners, no shadows, and instant motion.
docs: Add these imports once to app/globals.css: @import "../components/control-ui/styles/skin-theme.css"; @import "../components/control-ui/styles/skin.css";

files.content:
/* "flat" skin pack skin.css stub — re-tokens Control UI to a neutral reset with squared corners,
 * no shadows, and instant motion; intentionally blank because it needs no component CSS. */
